expected_behavior: The valid benchmark report fixture parses through @krn/contracts while keeping productivity_lift_claimed false and lift_status no_lift_evidence.
failure_mode: Benchmark report fixtures can no longer prove the no-lift contract boundary.

expected_behavior: The known-bad benchmark report fixture that claims productivity lift from fixture data fails deterministically.
failure_mode: KRN accepts fixture or aggregate-eval data as measured productivity lift.

expected_behavior: The known-bad benchmark report fixture that labels failed-task evidence as positive_lift fails deterministically even when productivity_lift_claimed is false.
failure_mode: KRN accepts positive lift status from a dirty positive delta with failed baseline tasks.

expected_behavior: The runner writes a benchmark report under .krn/benchmarks/krn-benchmark-spine and parses it through @krn/contracts.
failure_mode: The benchmark runner produces unparseable, unsourced, or overclaiming runtime evidence.

expected_behavior: The eval report names the generated benchmark report path and states that fixture-contract output is not live productivity lift.
assertions: eval report has generated benchmark path
eval report caveat names no productivity lift
eval report caveat names live benchmark gap
failure_mode: A green benchmark-spine eval is overclaimed as live productivity improvement.
